finding_title: 调度模板路径未结构化转义，macOS plist 甚至不可解析
scope: Harden Stage 1 scheduler dry-run templates for Linux systemd and Windows PowerShell special-character paths, supplementing existing macOS plistlib A-013 evidence.
non_scope: No scheduler installation, launchd bootstrap, systemctl enablement, Register-ScheduledTask execution, SMTP, Release, production restore, public schema, DB migration, source adapter, ranking, CURRENT, V7.1/V7.2 contract file, P0/P1 closure, integrated production acceptance, or daily operation enablement change.

scheduler_template_contract.macos: plistlib launchd plist with structured ProgramArguments
scheduler_template_contract.linux: systemd service uses EnvironmentFile and quoted ExecStart arguments plus separate env template
scheduler_template_contract.windows: PowerShell uses ArgumentList array and Join-CommandArgument helper
scheduler_template_contract.external_parser_gate: systemd-analyze and pwsh were unavailable locally; structural local parser checks are recorded instead

validation: py_compile PASS for stage1_runtime.py and test_stage1_runtime.py

external systemd-analyze and pwsh parser gates NOT RUN because commands were unavailable locally; Python plistlib/configparser and PowerShell argument-array structural checks cover local regression gate
remaining_blockers: Inherited V7.1 P0=8 and P1=37 remain open until independent review accepts remediation evidence.
S2PMT07 final gate precheck remains blocked.
This manifest does not enable scheduler installation or claim INTEGRATED_PRODUCTION_ACCEPTED.
